name: Badge
purpose: Labels compact status, metadata, or categorical information using approved semantic tones.
whenToUse: Use for compact status communication such as state, category, or priority.
Use when semantic emphasis needs to stay consistent with the token system.
whenNotToUse: Do not use as a button or tap target.
Do not introduce custom color chips when an existing Badge tone already communicates the status.
accessibilityRequirements: Do not rely on color alone for meaning; pair Badge with readable label text.
Keep badge copy concise so it is understandable when announced by assistive technology.
Do not turn Badge into an interactive control.
